units.title: COMPUTER SKILLS IN AUTOMOTIVE TYRE AND WHEEL SERVICES

performance_criteria.description: Explain the functions of various hardware and software components of the computer
Differentiate between operating . system and application software

learning_outcomes.description: Understand pre alignment Operations

performance_criteria.description: State reasons for alignment.
Describe the function of the following in the wheel alignment machine: • Castor • Camber • (King Pin Inclination/Steering Angle Inclination) KPI/SAI
Check the following: • Tore in • Tore out

learning_outcomes.description: Perform Alignment Pre-Checks

performance_criteria.description: State the purpose of pre-alignment checks.
List the step-by-step procedures for pre-alignment checks.
Carry out pre alignment checks.

learning_outcomes.description: Perform Wheel Alignment Operation

performance_criteria.description: Select the appropriate tools and equipment for wheel alignment
Carry out wheel alignment operations
Check final adjustment and settings are within tolerance
Complete all wheel alignment operations within the agreed timescale.
Make clear and suitable recommendations for any further action to the relevant authorities

learning_outcomes.description: Perform Alignment Post Checks Ref. Page No. Tore in Tore out OUTCOME (LO) able to:

performance_criteria.description: State the purpose of post-alignment checks.

Carry out post wheel alignment checks to ensure conformity to specifications.

learning_outcomes.description: Understand Wheel Balancing

performance_criteria.description: Differentiate between wheel alignment and balancing.
Explain the following: • Dynamic unbalance • Static unbalance • Toe-in • Toe-out, etc.
Explain the effects of unbalanced wheel while driving a given motor vehicle

learning_outcomes.description: Perform Pre-balancing checks

performance_criteria.description: Explain the purpose of pre-balancing checks

learning_outcomes.description: Perform Wheel balancing operation

performance_criteria.description: Explain the importance of wheel balancing Examine a given motor vehicle (while driving) to ascertain the wheel balancing status.

Check final adjustment and settings are within the tolerance range
